summary: Comprehensive backend API testing for AdHub. Created /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py with 35 pytest cases covering auth (email/password + Google session stub), RBAC (super_admin/manager/client), workspaces, ad accounts (mock OAuth), campaigns (list/filter/get/toggle), analytics (overview/timeseries), alerts, reports, admin users, and AI audit (Claude Sonnet 4.5). All 35 tests pass after one bug fix.

bugs_found_and_fixed.issue: Returned 500 Internal Server Error - 'ObjectId is not iterable'. Motor's insert_one mutated the doc in-place to add MongoDB _id, which was then included in the JSON response and failed FastAPI's jsonable_encoder.
bugs_found_and_fixed.fix: Excluded '_id' (in addition to 'password_hash') from response dict in /app/backend/server.py register endpoint.

critical_code_review_comments: Several other endpoints have the same potential _id leak pattern as register (mutating dicts after insert_one). Current ones are safe because they construct response objects via Pydantic models (Workspace, AdAccount, Report) before returning, but be cautious adding new endpoints that return raw doc dicts.
/api/auth/login returns user from DB without explicitly stripping _id from a fresh fetch — but it does pop('_id', None) so safe. Consider standardizing with a serialize_user() helper.
Token in JWT lacks a 'jti' / revocation mechanism; logout only clears the Emergent session cookie, not the bearer JWT (acceptable for MVP but worth noting).
analytics_overview/timeseries silently ignore workspace_id when not in user's accessible IDs (falls back to all). Should return 403 for consistency.
_seed_campaigns_for_account uses random.randint(3,5) so newly-connected meta_ads/google_ads accounts return 3-5 campaigns; ga4 returns 0 (by design). Documented behavior is correct.
server.py is 835 lines — close to the 700-line guideline. Consider splitting into routers (auth, workspaces, campaigns, analytics, ai).
test_credentials: admin@adhub.com/admin123 (super_admin), manager@adhub.com/manager123 (manager), client@northwind.com/client123 (client) — all working as documented in /app/memory/test_credentials.md
seed_data_creation: Used existing seeded data (3 brands, ~24-36 campaigns, alerts, reports). Tests create TEST_ prefixed registrants/workspaces/reports/ad-accounts which remain in DB but are clearly tagged.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend is fully functional. Tests use shared module-level state dict for cross-test data dependencies; must run as a full suite, not individual tests. AI audit endpoint /api/ai/audit successfully calls Claude Sonnet 4.5 via emergentintegrations and returns expected JSON shape; heuristic fallback also verified by code review. Frontend not tested per request scope.
ai_integration_notes: POST /api/ai/audit responded successfully within ~5s using Claude Sonnet 4.5. Response includes overall_score, headline, and recommendations[] with title/severity/campaign/issue/action fields. Heuristic fallback path exists in code but was not triggered during test.
